_note: STARTING gems per class — the skill + support gem each class already has in inventory at level 1. The overlay marks these 'you start with it' and never puts them on the buy or quest-reward list (you already own them). Owner-confirmed and validated against data/gems.json (the wiki gem list). Names must match the gem exactly (support gems keep the ' Support' suffix). Not touched by the gem-data fetch; edit + rebuild if a patch changes them.
